The all-in-one data analysis, reporting, and AI tools for manufacturers to gain a real-time view of manufacturing operations.

items.text: Transform Your Operations With Folio3's Manufacturing Analytics Suite

The vast amounts of data generated through machines, sensors, supply chain logistics, and quality control is often underutilized and trapped in departmental silos. A manufacturing data analytics solution helps you break down data silos and connect your data from all sources into a single source of truth to drive actionable insights. Folio3 offers a pre-built manufacturing analytics solution with room for customization, providing you with dashboards for real-time data analytics for smart manufacturing systems and gaining deeper insights into the entire production ecosystem.

headings.text: Transform Your Operations With Folio3's Manufacturing Analytics Suite

paragraphs: The vast amounts of data generated through machines, sensors, supply chain logistics, and quality control is often underutilized and trapped in departmental silos. items.text: Achieve better operational visibility and control by leveraging our manufacturing analytics dashboards:
Optimize your production schedules and manage supplies by having clear visibility into your inventory levels, stockouts, and lead times.
Monitor throughput, cycle times, and machine utilization with real-time data analytics for smart manufacturing systems.
Monitor product delivery performance to oversee if the products are delivered on time and complete.
Connect sales data with production capabilities to optimize scheduling and boost order fulfillment.

items.text: Our expertise in data analytics consulting for manufacturing helps provide a solution tailored to your unique manufacturing business needs. Built on Microsoft Azure cloud infrastructure, our Manufacturing Analytics Suite offers:
Get a head start with our pre-built manufacturing dashboards comprising all standard data points with the flexibility of customizing them to visualize specific KPIs and operational me
With a manufacturing data analytics solution, you can create intuitive charts, graphs, and heatmaps, pinpointing anomalies requiring instant attention.
Access critical manufacturing insights from anywhere around the floor, executive office, or outside working vicinity using any device.
Provide relevant, personalized views of data to production managers, quality control teams, executives, and more.
Create a single source of truth for all your big data analytics in manufacturing by integrating data from ERPs, IoT sensors, legacy machines, and supply chain platforms.
From reporting data to generating insights that drive immediate and impactful operational improvements.

items.text: The Indispensable Value of BI Reporting for Manufacturers
Identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and areas for improvement using business intelligence reporting.
Pinpoint root causes of defects and discrepancies by analyzing data from production and quality inspections.
Prevent overstocking or stockouts by gaining insights into demand patterns, production schedules, and material consumption.
Extend equipment/asset lifespan by using real-time machine data insights to predict their failures and maintain them.
Big data analytics in manufacturing helps uncover areas of waste and inefficiencies in energy consumption.

headings.text: The Indispensable Value of BI Reporting for Manufacturers

paragraphs: Identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and areas for improvement using business intelligence reporting.
Pinpoint root causes of defects and discrepancies by analyzing data from production and quality inspections.
Prevent overstocking or stockouts by gaining insights into demand patterns, production schedules, and material consumption.
Extend equipment/asset lifespan by using real-time machine data insights to predict their failures and maintain them.
Big data analytics in manufacturing helps uncover areas of waste and inefficiencies in energy consumption.

items.text: Covering All Data Analytics Use Cases In Manufacturing
Gain a unified view of Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) across multiple plants.
Examine supplier performance and optimize the supply chain for enhanced efficiency.
Visualize product defect rates, quality tests, and customer feedback to pinpoint quality issues and their root causes.
Foresee equipment failures before they take place and transition to proactive maintenance approach instead of relying on reactive repairs.
Track energy consumption across your manufacturing facility and implement an optimization plan for more efficient usage.
Analyze production parameters to identify factors influencing yield rates, reduce scrap, and improve material utilization.

items.text: Features of Our Advanced Manufacturing Data Analytics Suite
A centralized data storage to minimize data duplication and movement from disparate systems, like sensors, ERPs, etc.
The AI/ML & predictive algorithms to continuously monitor production parameters, detecting faults and forecasting production trends.
Access the tailored models to monitor Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE), product quality, and production cycle times.
Use the powerful features of integrated Copilot-backed artificial intelligence within the analytics suite to automate your production processes.
Get instant alerts for any disturbances caused in your production, exceeding certain threshold limits, so you can quickly respond to such anomalies.

items.text: Power BI is a business intelligence tool by Microsoft. End-to-end BI solution for manufacturing data analytics to act as the primary interface for visualizing complex operational data, facilitating manufacturers to monitor KPIs, identify trends, and gain actionable insights from various sources like ERP systems, IoT devices, and production machinery.

Folio3, a certified Microsoft Solutions Partner with considerable experience in data analytics consulting for manufacturing, customizes Power BI to fit the unique demands of each industrial client. This involves:
Integrating data from all of your different production systems (MES, SCADA, ERP, and IoT sensors).
Creating custom dashboards and reports that include relevant KPIs for your industry and operational objectives.
Implementing role-based security ensures that different users only see data relevant to their roles.
Providing training and continuous assistance to ensure that your staff can properly use the platform.

Folio3’s Manufacturing Analytics Dashboard provides a variety of advantages, including real-time data analytics for smart manufacturing systems, increased operational efficiency, improved quality control, optimized inventory management, proactive predictive maintenance, significant cost savings, and data-driven decision making. It delivers a complete, unified perspective of the whole production process, resulting in greater productivity and profitability.

Absolutely. We develop manufacturing data analytics software with flexibility in mind. While we do provide robust pre-built dashboards, we specialize in customizing them to suit your specific production processes, KPIs, and reporting needs. This guarantees that the dashboard gives the precise insights required to make smart business decisions.

Folio3’s dashboard uses advanced data visualization techniques in Power BI to provide complicated manufacturing data analytics in an understandable and accessible style. This includes interactive charts, graphs, gauges, maps, and bespoke graphics that allow users to immediately detect patterns, highlight abnormalities, and drill down into granular data for more detailed research.

Yes, our Manufacturing Analytics Dashboard, developed with Microsoft Azure and Power BI, is cross-platform compatible. You can securely access your dashboards and reports from desktop PCs, laptops, tablets, and mobile devices, ensuring that crucial insights are always available, no matter where you are.

Folio3 creates role-based dashboarding to ensure that every user, from shop floor workers and production managers to quality control specialists and executive leadership, has a customized view of the data that is relevant to their unique duties. This avoids information overload while providing highly focused, actionable manufacturing floor insights relevant to their daily work and strategic goals. This method is critical for effective top-rated AI solutions for real-time data analytics in manufacturing.
